title: Refactor model with BioDNA and FractalLinear classes :))
author: irroder

data.description: Replaces stored weights with a centralized hypernetwork-like genotype that procedurally generates layer parameters on demand.
Linear layers have no persistent weights and query BioDNA to generate parameters dynamically based on layer depth and function.
Uses matrix associativity to compute (X @ c) @ r.T instead of materializing a full weight matrix, reducing VRAM usage.
Bio-replicative architecture that treats the model as DNA plus growth instructions rather than a stored parameter set.

novel_contributions: Centralized HyperNetwork Genotype that stores DNA/instructions instead of explicit weights
Dynamic morphogenesis where each Linear layer generates its parameters on the fly
Matrix associativity trick to avoid materializing large weight matrices in VRAM
Decoupling disk footprint from model capacity to fit within the 16MB constraint
